steps.title: Identify the goal and key information
steps.content: The goal is to provide an example of a position in Cecchetti method ballet. The notes contain the critical information: “In Cecchetti method ballet, there is a position called third position.” To achieve the goal, the answer must name this specific position and connect it to Cecchetti method.

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer
steps.content: Choice C directly accomplishes the goal by naming “Third position” as an example and identifying it as a position in Cecchetti method ballet. Choices A, B, and D either discuss positions generally or mention the method without providing the concrete example. That matches choice C — C is correct.
